title: reel:edit-audio args
description: Add / update / remove an audio clip (BGM / SFX / voice-over) on a scene timeline. op='add' needs role+ref+startMs+durationMs (ref = a mediaStore audio id, e.g. from reel:list-assets; returns new id). op='update' patches by id — including volume (0..1) and fade in/out (剪映式音量包络). op='remove' deletes by id. Times are ms relative to scene start. Call reel:get-scene-timeline / reel:list-assets first.

id.description: Audio clip id. Required for update/remove.

ref.description: mediaStore id of the sound file. Required for add.

startMs.description: Clip start on timeline (ms). Required for add.

durationMs.description: Clip length on timeline (ms). Required for add.

fadeOutMs.description: Fade-out length (ms), ramps volume -> 0 at the tail.
